title: pseudocyclosorus repens
intro: Pseudocyclosorus repens, also known as the creeping fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pseudocyclosorus repens are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pseudocyclosorus repens can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
